Summary: Reproduced teammate preprocessing exactly and generated A.csv with stopwords kept.
Generated B.csv by selectively removing stopwords while preserving negation words.
Created stratified 80/10/10 splits for Version A and Version B using the same random seed.
Defined four controlled experiments across two models and two preprocessing versions.
Fine-tuned BERTweet on Version A and Version B.
Fine-tuned RoBERTa on Version A and Version B.
Evaluated all four experiments on the held-out test set with accuracy, precision, recall, F1, and confusion matrices.
Compared Version A and Version B to determine whether stopword removal helped or reduced performance.
Ranked the four experiments mainly by held-out test macro-F1.
Analyzed false positives, false negatives, confidence patterns, text length, and surface features for the best model.
Selected RoBERTa Version A as the final model based mainly on test macro-F1.
Created a Streamlit prediction demo using the selected local checkpoint.
Created a fuller Streamlit dashboard showing workflow progress, reports, results, and demo.
Generated a risk register, responsible-use checklist, and ethics/limitations documentation.
Generated full academic documentation from the completed project outputs.
